name: Negotiator
description: Dahl pistol with a two-round burst while aiming down sights, plus a fast fire rate and a large magazine. Compared to most Dahl pistols it shoots quicker and kicks less, making burst fire steadier and more damaging over time. With fire rate boosting skills such as Metal Storm, Lay Waste, or Embrace the Pain, the barrel can spin so quickly it can look like both shots happen at once.
notes: Only appears at green rarity or above. Random world drop from any appropriate loot source.
